ble.promptConnect: Tap connect to search BLE device
ble.disconnectConfirm: Are you sure to disconnect from {name}?

env.bluetoothDisabled: Bluetooth is disabled. Please turn on Bluetooth in control center or system settings.
env.locationDisabled: GPS/Location service is disabled. Please enable location service to scan for Bluetooth devices.
env.locationNotAuthorized: WeChat has no location permission. Please grant WeChat location permission in system settings.
env.wechatBluetoothRefused: Bluetooth permission is required. Click 'Settings' to enable Bluetooth permission.
env.wechatLocationRefused: Location permission is required. Click 'Settings' to enable location permission.
env.androidNearbyDesc: To scan and connect nearby BMS hardware, we need to request 'Nearby Devices' permission.
env.androidLocationDesc: According to Android guidelines, scanning Bluetooth requires 'Location' permission.
env.androidPermissionDenied: Bluetooth/Location permission denied. App cannot get battery data. Please enable it in system settings.
env.androidGpsDisabled: Scanning Bluetooth requires location service. Click 'Enable' to open location settings.

control.title: MOS Switch Control
control.chargeMosDesc: Controls whether current can charge into the battery pack
control.dischargeMosDesc: Controls whether current can discharge from the battery pack
